risks.title: Production schema migration failure
risks.description: Prisma migration may fail on production SQLite/PostgreSQL if the DB state diverges from migration history.
risks.evidence: P18 fixture DB migration passed (16/16). No production migration attempted yet.
risks.mitigation: Run migration in a staging environment first. Capture full DB backup before applying. Verify schema idempotency.
risks.approvalImpact: Must be resolved before CTO approval token is used

risks.title: Production data backup not documented
risks.description: No production DB backup procedure is documented in current artifacts. If migration causes data loss, recovery path is unclear.
risks.evidence: P18 rollback tested on fixture DB only (27/27 PASS). Production backup not in scope for P17-P21.
risks.mitigation: Document production backup procedure before applying migration. Verify backup is restorable.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P22: Document and test production backup/restore procedure
risks.approvalImpact: CTO/CEO token should not be used until backup plan is documented

risks.title: releaseDate inferred backfill accuracy
risks.description: releaseDate values were inferred from filing metadata. Inferred dates may differ from actual announcement dates for a subset of records.
risks.evidence: P17 schema patch adds releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence fields to track inference quality. P18 backfill 23/23 PASS (fixture data).
risks.mitigation: Review releaseDateConfidence distribution in production data. Flag LOW-confidence records for manual review.
risks.approvalImpact: Informational — does not block approval token if backup and staging are complete

risks.title: Query gate regression in production
risks.description: Production query gate behavior may differ from fixture DB if data volumes or indexing diverge.
risks.evidence: P17 query gate validation ALL_PASS (18/18). P18 query gate PASS (22/22). Gate logic is purely field-existence based.
risks.mitigation: Run query gate checks against production DB shadow after migration (read-only). Gate logic does not depend on row values.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P22: Add production query gate smoke test step to runbook
risks.approvalImpact: Low risk; gate logic validated thoroughly in prior phases

risks.title: FundamentalResearchService behavior change
risks.description: FundamentalResearchService may begin including MonthlyRevenue fields post-migration, changing data returned to callers.
risks.evidence: P20 comparison showed 0 signal changes and 0 bucket changes across 4500 rows. MonthlyRevenue gated out by PIT guard.
risks.mitigation: PIT guard remains active post-migration. Only releaseDate < queryDate rows admitted. No behavior change expected at service boundary.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P22: Add FundamentalResearchService integration test in staging
risks.approvalImpact: PIT guard is the primary control; validated at P19

risks.title: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer behavior change
risks.description: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer may change scoring behavior if MonthlyRevenue fields are exposed post-migration.
risks.mitigation: Scoring formula is not modified by migration. MonthlyRevenue remains gated until releaseDate is available.
risks.nextPhaseAction: Monitor scoring output in production after migration via canary check
risks.approvalImpact: Low risk; scoring verified unchanged at P20

risks.title: Active scoring replay comparability
risks.description: Post-migration replay results may drift if production data differs from the p3/p19 frozen corpora.
risks.mitigation: Freeze corpora before migration. Post-migration comparison uses same corpus so drift is detectable.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P22: Re-run P20 comparison after production migration to verify 0 drift

risks.title: Rollback execution risk
risks.description: Production rollback may not be fully reversible if migration is partially applied before failure.
risks.evidence: P18 rollback tested (27/27 PASS) on fixture DB. Prisma down migrations are additive-only.
risks.mitigation: Ensure full DB backup before migration. Test rollback on staging before production. Document exact rollback steps.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P22: Rollback staging rehearsal as a prerequisite step
risks.approvalImpact: Required: staging rollback rehearsal before production token use

risks.title: Monitoring / observability gap post-migration
risks.description: No specific monitoring for MonthlyRevenue PIT gate activation is documented for production environment.
risks.evidence: P19 PIT guard validated on corpus. No production monitoring dashboards created in P17-P21.
risks.mitigation: Add monitoring for: MonthlyRevenue rows admitted vs excluded, releaseDateConfidence distribution, query gate errors.
risks.approvalImpact: Recommended before Go-Live but not a hard blocker for token request

risks.title: Deployment approval ambiguity
risks.description: If P22 proceeds without a clear CTO/CEO approval token hand-off process, the production migration may be applied without proper authorization.
risks.mitigation: Document token hand-off process. P22 script must validate token before proceeding. Token must not be auto-generated.
risks.nextPhaseAction: CTO/CEO to provide token after reviewing this P21 report. P22 must gate on token.
risks.approvalImpact: Hard blocker: production migration MUST NOT proceed without explicit token
